ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Bajaj Electricals Limited has communicated the upcoming dividend payment of Rs. 3.00 per share for FY 2025-26, emphasizing the mandatory Tax Deduction at Source (TDS) on these distributions. Shareholders are required to proactively update their details and submit relevant tax exemption documents or DTAA declarations by July 17, 2026. Failure to do so will result in higher TDS being applied, materially impacting immediate dividend payouts and necessitating a subsequent refund claim from tax authorities.
